Thank you for your interest in contributing to syllago!

This project uses [Vouch](https://github.com/mitchellh/vouch) to manage contributions. Pull requests are only accepted from **vouched contributors**.

### How to get vouched

1. **Start with an issue.** Open a bug report, feature idea, or improvement suggestion. Your thinking is the most valuable contribution.
2. **Engage with the project.** Participate in discussions, help reproduce bugs, or provide feedback on proposed changes.
3. **Get vouched.** Once a maintainer is familiar with your work, they can vouch for you by commenting `!vouch` on one of your issues.

After you're vouched, you can open pull requests. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/OpenScribbler/syllago/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) for development setup and guidelines.
